title: Add rerun command for EODF workflow
summary: Add a 'rerun' CLI command that re-runs verification and gate evaluation on an existing issue workspace without re-creating the worktree or re-running the builder. This is essential for the semi-auto EODF workflow where manual code changes need re-verification.
acceptance_criteria: spec-orch rerun SPC-XXX re-runs verification in existing workspace
rerun updates gate verdict and explain.md
CLI help shows the new rerun command
Unit test covers the rerun command

context.architecture_notes: RunController already has review_issue and accept_issue which reuse existing workspaces. rerun follows the same pattern but re-runs verification.
